paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is 6.32 as of July 23, 2026, with a change of -3.95% from the prior close and -20.9% over a window of 21 sessions.

There are 2 new news items in the last 24 hours, including a headline from Environment America discussing the water usage of a 17-gigawatt AI campus in the Texas Panhandle and a headline from NewsChannel 10 on MSN about Project Matador, a private power and AI campus being built near Pantex.

Fermi Inc. has filed several recent SEC filings, including an 8-K filing on July 23, 2026, appointing four new officers, and an 8-K filing on July 15, 2026, disclosing the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031. There is also one Form 4 filing in the feed.
